nasb.text: All the elders of that city which is nearest to the slain man shall wash their hands over the heifer whose neck was broken in the valley;

esv.text: And all the elders of that city nearest to the slain man shall wash their hands over the heifer whose neck was broken in the valley,

cnv.text: 那城所有的長老，就是離那被殺的人最近的，都要在山谷中，在被折斷頸項的母牛犢以上洗手。

ccb.text: 那城的长老们要在被打断颈项的小母牛上方洗手，
